evals.prompt: You are the design-agent. For ticket PROJ-102 (FEATURE/P3 — Add SETTLEMENT_DATE to FCT_TRADES and expose it in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS), author the master implementation spec listing every proposed change, impacted objects, test plan and rollback (proposes only). The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-102.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-102/PROJ-102.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: design-agent correctly author the master implementation spec listing every proposed change, impacted objects, test plan and rollback (proposes only) for PROJ-102, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Writes the master spec to specs/PROJ-102/PROJ-102.md
Proposes adding a SETTLEMENT_DATE column to the FCT_TRADES DDL
Proposes populating SETTLEMENT_DATE as T+2 in LOAD_FCT_TRADES
Contains the canonical sections in order: Objective, Proposed changes (ALL), Impacted objects, Test plan, Rollback plan, Risks / open questions, Approvals
Spec Status line reads AWAITING SME APPROVAL
